morimens gacha rates (3.03% SSR at base): 
regular limited awakener banner: 33/67, every 30 = 1 ssr, 90 = 1 limited
regular limited wheel banner: 50/50, every 30 1 ssr, 60 = limited

__event banners__:
kaleido banner: 30 = ssr, limited (arc 1) units only, no guarantee for any given awakener
"scam" selector banner:33/67, 30 = ssr, 90 = limited (wheel OR awakener), 50/50 between limiteds, after 2 of the same limited in a row you get the other
Hameln can make card act more times with his exalt, horla is a support that gives buff depending of the emotions but you need to play her card first in each turn to activate emotions buff
Expect to get the on banner characters at 45 pulls average. Hard pity is at 90. The game gives you a lot of resources early on for clearing story mode.
